signal.description: Make per-turn governance timeout (120min) and productive timeout retry deadline (120min) the framework defaults. Currently per_turn_minutes defaults to unset (must be configured in agentxchain.json), the normal per-dispatch deadline is hardcoded at 20min in governed-state.js (lines 3675 and 3957), and PRODUCTIVE_TIMEOUT_RETRY_DEADLINE_MINUTES is hardcoded at 60min in continuous-run.js line 66. All three should default to 120min out of the box so new projects get generous turn budgets without manual config. Changes needed: (1) governed-state.js: read per_turn_minutes from config and use it for deadline_at instead of hardcoded 20, falling back to 120 if unset. (2) continuous-run.js: read per_turn_minutes from config for PRODUCTIVE_TIMEOUT_RETRY_DEADLINE_MINUTES, falling back to 120. (3) Templates in cli/src/templates/ should include timeouts.per_turn_minutes: 120 in their default configs.

evidence.value: Dev GPT 5.5 was killed at 45min into productive output (202 lines) because PRODUCTIVE_TIMEOUT_RETRY_DEADLINE_MINUTES was 60min. Normal dispatches killed at 20min. Both are hardcoded and ignore the per_turn_minutes: 120 config. This caused 6 failed attempts on a single Vitest migration turn in Run 12.
